title: Challenge SMP Modpack
description: The Modpack for the Challenge SMP, includes all the required mods and some mods to make sure everything runs great!
body:
**Purpose:**
> To provide a simple installation process for players on the Challenge SMP. This modpack includes all the necessary mods for playing on the server, such as BetterEnd, and also other mods. 

**What is the Challenge SMP?**
> Challenge SMP is a NEW Minecraft SMP focused on a unique concept, every achievement grows the world border slightly! With over 1000 achievements, an active community and regular updates, are you up to the challenge? 

**How do I join this SMP?**
> Simply join my discord: https://discord.gg/QqKXc8NKWX

**What Mods Do I Actually Need?**
> - Fabric API
> - BetterEnd, Bclib, BetterNether
> - Traverse, Terrestria, Traveler's Backpack
> - Cardinal API
> - Simple Voice Chat

**What Additional Mods Does this Modpack Provide?**

*Optimisation/Performance*

> Sodium, Lithium, Entity Culling Fabric, Enhanced Block Entities

*Utility*

> Xaero's Minimap, Xaero's World Map, Mod Menu, Elytra Trims

*Other*

> Cloth Config API, Reese's Sodium Options, Sodium Extra
